title: Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
company: Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
